Create file governance/validators/validate_release_proof_manifest.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED_IDS = {"remote_commit_sha", "validated_external_telegram_production_receipt", "validated_external_live_runtime_receipt", "validated_external_claude_audit_result", "release_decision_validator_pass"}
FORBIDDEN = {"local_sha_only", "templates", "mock_fixtures", "gpt_self_claim", "chat_only_claim", "issue_comment"}


def validate(path="governance/release/release_proof_manifest.json"):
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    ids = {x.get("id") for x in data.get("required_for_release_pass", [])}
    missing = REQUIRED_IDS - ids
    if missing:
        errors.append(f"missing release requirements {sorted(missing)}")
    forbidden = set(data.get("forbidden_as_release_proof", []))
    missing_forbidden = FORBIDDEN - forbidden
    if missing_forbidden:
        errors.append(f"missing forbidden proof classes {sorted(missing_forbidden)}")
    if data.get("release_pass") is not False:
        errors.append("manifest must not claim release_pass")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS release_proof_manifest")
